parameters: Isn't this place beautiful? It's named after
the town south of here, Haven Harbor!
\adamI see you have a new friend...
are you a cleric by any chance?
\adamYou see, I came upon a \iw[11] on
my adventure. It provides powerful magic,
but unfortunately, I can't use it...
\adam...so maybe you'd like to take it off my hands?
\adamAnd I'm running low on bits. It looks like
this trade benefits both of us, so what do
\adamRight... but we're out on The Trail!
Think of the markup as a delivery fee!
